concerns.text: InvariantsDataset.dataset_id format 'invariants_{timestamp}' in data-model.md contradicts invariants_dataset.schema.yaml pattern 'dataset_[0-9]+'. Contract schema uses different identifier format than data model definition.
Data model defines InvariantsDataset.knots[] but contract schema uses knot_records[]. Field naming inconsistency between data model and contract definition.
CompositeComplexityScore entity defined in data-model.md has no corresponding contract schema file. Missing contract for one of the four main entities creates implementation ambiguity.

Constitution Check in plan.md claims Principle II (Verified Accuracy) PASS with 'All citations in research.md verified before inclusion', but research.md Dataset Strategy table explicitly states 'NO verified source found' for Knot Atlas, KnotInfo, and OEIS A002863. Constitution check status contradicts actual content.

research.md states 9988 prime knots at crossing number 13 (source: OEIS A002863), but spec.md Assumptions section states 'For crossing number 13, the exact count is 49 prime knots'. Factual contradiction between documents on core dataset size.

Constitution Principle V requires state file 'state/projects/PROJ-552-quantifying-the-complexity-of-knot-diagr.yaml' for versioning discipline, but this file path is not listed in the documented project structure under plan.md.

Multiple regression contract schemas exist with different field structures (regression_model.schema.yaml, regression_output.schema.yaml, regression_result.schema.yaml). No clear guidance on which is canonical for implementation, creating potential integration confusion.
